name: The Entrance To France
description:
You are in a large street of France, with hight lamps using as light some
candles. You can feel the romantic mood from the atmosphere of the city of
light. There is a sign here that says "Dont forget to visit the cathedral
of Paris." From here you can continue in this street by going east, go to
the town of Lyon by going south, or enter to the Champs Elyses at north.
